f002_w003_fabric_folding.take_garment_from_stack: a worker grasps the top light-blue folded garment and removes it from the stack
f002_w003_fabric_folding.fold_garment_sides: a worker folds the left and right sides of a light-blue garment inward and straightens the folded garment on the table
f002_w003_fabric_folding.pick_up_hanger: a worker reaches to the pile of black clothes hangers on the left and lifts one black hanger

f003_w007_wax_pattern.event_001: a worker cleans a cluster of small yellow wax parts using a thin handheld brush or rod
f003_w007_wax_pattern.event_002: a worker makes a white mark on the small yellow wax part held in their hands
f003_w007_wax_pattern.event_003: a worker places the cluster of small yellow wax parts onto the tray filled with similar yellow parts

f003_w009_injection_molding.event_001: a worker removes small yellow molded parts from the open metal mold and places them on the tray to the right
f003_w009_injection_molding.event_002: a worker picks up and holds a thin metal rod beside the open mold

f003_w010_mold_preparation.event_001: a worker places a yellow rectangular mold cover over the metal mold box

f004_w002_thread_trimming.event_001: a worker uses blue-handled scissors to cut loose threads from a white garment on the table
f004_w002_thread_trimming.event_002: a worker unfolds and spreads a white garment flat on the work table
